125 D0200D2_LTL_ENRGY_FREQ_CD D0200D2_LTL_ENRGY_FREQ_CD D0200D2 Resident Mood Interview - Little Energy Frequency Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates if the resident is feeling tired or has little energy. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Never or 1 day
1=2-6 days (several days)
2=7-11 days (half or more of the days)
3=12-14 days (nearly every day)
^=Blank (skip pattern) discontinued 09/30/2023
